title: verbascum thapsiforme var. laxum
intro: Verbascum thapsiforme var. laxum, commonly known as the Mullein flower or Velvet plant, is a biennial or perennial plant belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The Mullein flower has been used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality, thanks to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, Verbascum thapsiforme var. laxum is often used in teas, infusions, tinctures, and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits and alleviate various health issues.
